channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: Finding a focus area for deep work
item.description:
Notes:

When you are trying to find out what to focus on in your deep work sessions it can be easiest to identify wildly important goal areas that will return tangible and substantial benefits. Then with your deep work sessions all focus should be on making sure that you are progressing toward those goals.

Sources:

  • Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.

item.title: Building a deep work ritual
item.description:
Notes:

When you are trying to develop a deep work routine you will need to be able to determine where you will work and for how long. You will need to determine how you will work and how you will maintain your flow state once you start.

Sources:

  • Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.

item.title: Flow leads to happiness
item.description:
Notes:

Mihaly Czikszentmihalyi found that we are happier when we are in a state of flow. Flow only occurs when we do something challenging over an extended period of time.

Sources:

Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
